creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
alepulver    2006-11-02 02:19:21 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    comms                Makefile 
  Added files:
    comms/syncterm       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  An ANSI-BBS terminal designed to connect to remote BBSs via telnet, rlogin, or
  SSH. Supports ANSI music and the IBM charset when possible. Will run from a
  console, under X11 using XLib, or using SDL.
  
  WWW: http://syncterm.bbsdev.net/
  
  PR:             ports/104622
  Submitted by:   shurd
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.163     +1 -0      ports/comms/Makefile
  1.1       +50 -0     ports/comms/syncterm/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/comms/syncterm/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/comms/syncterm/pkg-descr (new)
